notes: v0.16.42 — Mockup-fidelity pass. (1) BOSS KEYS chip in the topbar now uses the actual shop key art (boss_key_tex). SURGE/PULSE/KEYS chips bumped to 14px icons with 38px label gap so icons no longer overlap labels. (2) PLAY mosaic tiles rewritten to match Arcade Neon C mockup: vertical gradient overlay, filled accent badge chips, name + wrapped description bottom-anchored, hover doubles neon glow + adds inner accent wash. LOCKED tiles now show centred 'L O C K E D' wordmark rotated -8° instead of corner strap. (3) PRACTICE inner page rebuilt with Arcade Neon B cards: marquee header (◆ NAME ◆), animated scenes (2 ships dueling / pulsing orb with orbiters / filling paint grid), scanlines, footer with subtitle + description, doubled glow on hover. (4) BOSS RUSH detail: title block (badge + big name + description) now baked into hero scene overlay at the bottom over the gradient fade — matches mockup .title-wrap pattern. No more description bleeding into the leaderboard. Hero bumped to 260px. Windows only.
